emails.body: Re: Off-site: John Griebling's organization and Research Group Vince, Jeff does plan to attend the off-site in Breckenridge. I'm not sure exactly what time he'll arrive on Friday, 4/28, but will send those details when available. Thanks, SRS Vince J Kaminski@ECT 03/27/2000 04:43 PM
